name: anthropic-pulse
description: Fresh digest (every 30 min) of recent Anthropic news posts and research publications. Unlike the other 7 skills which mirror reference documentation, this one surfaces TIME-SENSITIVE narrative content — model launches, product announcements, partnership news, research papers — so Claude can answer 'did X just launch?' or 'what's Anthropic's recent thinking on Y?' without WebFetching the index page.

upstream._note: This skill does NOT use the standard docsIndexUrl + docsPathFilter pattern because the upstream is HTML index pages, not llms.txt. The pipeline scrape lives at pipeline/scripts/fetch-anthropic-pulse.sh and is wired into the workflow as a per-skill conditional step.

pipelineOverrides._note: This skill is deterministically rendered from upstream HTML — no LLM agents needed. fetch-anthropic-pulse.sh handles both fetch + render. Zero token cost per pipeline run.
